failedAssertions.reason: Swipe YES marks idea as approved but does not create a planning artifact or delivery run. The recordSwipe action only updates idea status - it does not call createDeliveryRun. Delivery Runs section shows 'No delivery runs yet.' even after approved ideas. IMPROVED from round 4: Add Idea button now works (fixed ReferenceError: autopilot is not defined bug in ProductProgramEditor), ideas can be created and swiped, but the idea->delivery step is still missing.

E2E product loop incomplete at idea->delivery step. Navigation to autopilot surfaces works. Ideas can be added and approved. BUT no delivery run is created from approved ideas. Swiping YES only changes idea status to 'Approved' - the createDeliveryRun action is not called from the swipe flow.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Automation tier selector visible and configurable, but cannot test enforcement without delivery runs. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 creating delivery runs.
Workspace configuration fields visible, but cannot verify isolated workspace/port allocation without delivery runs. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.

Budget input field now accessible (can set budget to $1.00), but cannot verify that exceeding budget caps actually pauses autopilot without running autopilot to depletion. Pause behavior not triggered.
No delivery runs exist to test convoy task blocking. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No delivery runs exist to test checkpoint/resume. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No delivery runs exist to test merge coordination. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No active delivery runs for operator intervention testing. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No completed runs for learner summaries. No Knowledge section visible. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No Digest section visible in UI. Cannot test digest generation. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.
No Release Health section visible. No merged runs with health failures. Depends on VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.

systemicBlockers.description: Swipe YES does not create delivery runs. The recordSwipe action in worker.ts updates idea status to 'approved' but does not call createDeliveryRun. This is the root cause blocking VAL-AUTOPILOT-030, VAL-CROSS-001, and all downstream assertions (031, 032, 035-041). Without delivery runs, the entire delivery-control flow cannot be exercised.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: The recordSwipe action (ACTION_KEYS.recordSwipe) only calls upsertIdea to update the idea's status to 'approved'. It does NOT call createDeliveryRun or createPlanningArtifact. The idea->delivery flow requires either: (1) recordSwipe to also create a delivery run, or (2) a separate trigger that creates runs from approved ideas.

improvementsFromRound4.description: Add Idea button now works. Fixed ReferenceError: autopilot is not defined in ProductProgramEditor. Ideas can be created via the form and appear in Swipe Review. However, the idea->delivery step still fails (no run created), so status is 'failed' not 'passed'.

Pause/Resume button works correctly. Previously appeared broken in round 4 because the ProductProgramEditor ReferenceError prevented the full Autopilot tab from rendering. After fixing the crash, the button functions correctly with state persisting across reloads.
E2E navigation now works (autopilot tab renders), ideas can be added and swiped YES. But no delivery run is created. The failure root cause is the same as VAL-AUTOPILOT-030.

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed ReferenceError: autopilot is not defined in ProductProgramEditor component. The autopilot variable was referenced but not in scope. Removed the undefined references (resolvedCompanyId, resolvedProjectId computed from autopilot, plus unused pauseAutopilot/resumeAutopilot actions). Rebuilt plugin.

frictions.description: Browser cached old plugin JavaScript - required hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) to pick up rebuilt plugin code
frictions.resolution: Hard refresh loaded new plugin code, Autopilot tab rendered correctly

frictions.description: Pause button required page reload to see state change visual update - button text does not immediately update after clicking
frictions.resolution: Reload confirms state persisted correctly even if immediate UI update is delayed

frictions.description: recordSwipe does not create delivery runs - swipe YES only updates idea status
frictions.resolution: Backend gap - recordSwipe action needs to also call createDeliveryRun for approved ideas

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 4 found Add Idea button disabled and autopilot stuck paused. Round 5 discovered the root cause: ReferenceError in ProductProgramEditor (autopilot variable undefined) caused the entire Autopilot tab to fail rendering. Fixed the crash and rebuilt plugin. After fix: Add Idea button works (ideas created and swiped), Pause/Resume works, E2E navigation works. IMPROVED: 030 (blocked→failed), 034 (failed→passed), CROSS-001 (reason updated). However, VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 and VAL-CROSS-001 still fail because recordSwipe does not create delivery runs/planning artifacts from approved ideas. All 9 blocked assertions remain blocked due to this root cause.
